hooks.command: CFG="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; grep -sq '"ecology"' "$CFG/settings.json" "$CFG/plugins/known_marketplaces.json" || echo 'WARNING: the ecology plugin marketplace is not installed — component-first enforcement and the spoke skills are OFF. Accept the plugin install prompt, or run: claude plugin marketplace add esassoc/ecology && enable spoke-kit@ecology via /plugin.'
